title: The Dog and His Shadow
synopsis: A dog carrying a bone sees another dog in the water below. A story about losing what you have by wanting more.
sentences: A Dog found a bone and happily carried it in his mouth.
He trotted along a road until he came to a narrow bridge over a stream.
As he crossed, he looked down into the clear water below.
There he saw what looked like another Dog carrying another bone.
The Dog did not understand that he was looking at his own reflection.
He thought, "That bone looks large. I want that one too."
So he opened his mouth to bark at the other Dog.
The moment he opened his mouth, his own bone fell into the stream.
The water carried it away before he could catch it.
The other Dog disappeared as well, because it had only been a shadow in the water.
The foolish Dog stood on the bridge with nothing at all.
He learned too late that greed can make a person lose even what they already have.
